subcodes.title: Khutba writen near the staging post of al-Safra 1
subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath known His Own Self through His Self, and none knoweth His Reality save Him. There is no God but Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الرحمن الرحیم. الحمد لله الذی قد عرف ذاته بذاته و لا یعلم احد کیف هو الا هو لا اله الا هو قد انشأ
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @The Primal Will; self-generation of the Primal Will, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity
